title: NorthPeak Audioworks warranty coverage and registration
content: All NorthPeak Audioworks products carry a 2-year limited warranty from the original purchase date, covering manufacturing defects under normal use. Registration is optional but recommended - it speeds up warranty claims since we can verify purchase date without a receipt. To register, customers need their product serial number and approximate purchase date. To file a warranty claim without registration, a receipt, order confirmation email, or other proof of purchase showing the purchase date is required. Cosmetic wear, accidental damage, and unauthorized modifications are not covered.
